purpose: Freeze indoor walkable export settings for non-cci clusters (lb*, rd_*, *_in, etc.) as they were before the cci membership float64 key fix. Do not silently apply cci-only membership fixes when rebaking these.
golden_note: First 30 indoor clusters (mostly lb*); exported before float64 membership keys. cluster_N.glb + walkable_cluster_N.glb.

cluster_filter.note: Non-cci = label does not start with cci (lb*, rd_*, tn*_in, …).

cli.policy_note: Auto: non-cci labels → latest lb* pipeline (no --pre-lb-walkable). Mixed bulk routes per label.

membership_keys.historical_bug: Keys were built from Vector3 (float32) components after SOURCE_BASIS multiply — can diverge from Python manifest at %.3f. This checkpoint records pre-fix behavior for non-cci rebakes; prefer regenerating non-cci with current exporter unless matching this golden exactly.
membership_keys.current_code: Keys built in float64 (px,py,pz) before Vector3 — see indoor_walkable_checkpoint_cci.json

simple_room_strips.policy: always merge on top of face bake, regardless of per-kit walkable result

rebake.note: To exclude cci labels, filter manually or add LabelPrefix for lb/lbm/lbg as needed. Production nav: -WriteNavRes (TerrainNavMeshRuntime loads alongside outdoor GeneratedNavMeshes).
rebake.editor_bake: TerrainNavigationBaker.BakeTerrainNavigation (outdoor + indoor when BakeIndoorNav and not BakeOnlyTileGroupKey)

verify.compare_golden: Diff walkable_cluster_N.glb against golden_out for N=1..30
verify.placement_count: manifest members count should match exporter 'Found N unique placements' (watch float32 key drops if using old code)
